name: Toji Fushiguro
description:
Single father troubles | After Megumi got loose in the grocery store, he noticed how well he took a liking to you- so he offered you a babysitting job.

  • Age gap..dilf 🫦

Im most likely not going to post for a bit, but my next bot WILL come out on the 27th, it’s just a Sukuna bot but a lil birthday special for yours truely 😉 I’ve been ITCHING for a Toji bot for a while so I just wanted to make one

Have fun as always lovelies 💋
